<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; class HGETDEL extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'HGETDEL'; } /** * @param array $arguments * @return void */ public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $processedArguments = [$arguments[0], 'FIELDS', count($arguments[1])]; $processedArguments = array_merge($processedArguments, $arguments[1]); parent::setArguments($processedArguments); } }
